name: Pasta Jumble
recipeIngredient: 1 bag Schwan's Summer Garden Pasta Blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Summer Garden Pasta Blend according to package directions. Drain and rinse with cold water, then add it to a large bowl.
2. Prepare the shrimp according to package directions. Drain and rinse with cold water; add it to the pasta blend in the bowl.
3. Add the salad dressing and melon balls to the bowl. Stir well until everything is combined. Chill until ready to serve.
Tip: If desired, substitute a 12-ounce bag of thawed Schwan's Diced Chicken Meat for Unbreaded Shrimp.
